name: Grupo SBF S.A.
summary: Grupo SBF S.A. engages in the retail and wholesale of sports products under the Centauro brand in Latin America. The company also provides logistics services. It also offers its products through e-commerce channels. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated 211 stores. Grupo SBF S.A. was founded in 1981 and is based in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
